room.caption: [G1Hub] So many Toads!

instance.creationCode: bStandOnly=true talker="Just a Toad" stringToShow="Hey there! It's quite a surprise to see anything that's not a bot in this area!" boxSize=1

bStandOnly=true talker="Homeowner Toad" if global.gameProgress<390 stringToShow="If only someone was brave enough to get a key. They would be able to reach Cackletta's Fortress." else stringToShow="We could finally move out of this horrible place if someone takes down Cackletta." boxSize=2
bStandOnly=true talker="Warning Toad" stringToShow="The Hammer Bros have a small fort beyond this door." boxSize=1 image_xscale=-1

bStandOnly=false talker="Upset Gamer Toad" stringToShow="Those Achievements you may or may not have gotten... They're useless, and most are arbitrary things that aren't even worthy of being called an achievement... Well I guess that means it was done correctly then." boxSize=3
